description: Style Note flying machine's swashbuckle styling is now available in its belts, pun intended! Riveting, bold designs at an affordable price, this FM belt is a buy you will not regret - as long lasting as it is stylish.  Product Details Black PU belt with a tang clasp and holes to customise Fit Rivet details (styled to look like a screw) at the centre of the belt Material and Care Polyurethane Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size and Fit Length at largest setting: 106 cm
